title: astragalus crassicarpus
intro: Astragalus crassicarpus, also known as broad-headed milkvetch, is a perennial plant native to North America. It is a legume with medicinal properties, traditionally used to enhance the immune system and boost overall health. The roots of the plant have been used in herbal preparations to promote the body's natural response to stress and infection, potentially offering benefits such as improved cardiovascular health and reduced inflammation. Astragalus crassicarpus can be consumed in various forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine.
